text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Last night, Ukrainian drone strikes hit the "Gorky" oil pumping station located in Nizhny Novgorod Oblast, western Russia. This facility is an important element of the Russian oil transportation structure and is part of the Transneft-Upper Volga JSC pipeline system. It's situated approx. 800km from the border with Ukraine. A significant fire broke out at the object as a result of the attack, with huge cloud of smoke rising dozens of meters into the air. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）昨晚，乌克兰无人机袭击了位于俄罗斯西部下诺夫哥罗德州的“高尔基”输油站。该设施是俄罗斯石油运输结构的重要组成部分，属于俄罗斯国家石油管道运输公司（Transneft-Upper Volga JSC）管道系统的一部分。它距离乌克兰边境约800公里。袭击导致该设施发生严重火灾，巨大的烟云升至数十米高空。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the U.S. Department of War, U.S. forces carried out a maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding of a sanctioned vessel, the M/T Majestic X, that was transporting oil from Iran in the U.S. Indo-Pacific Command area of responsibility (AOR). The action is in line with last week’s announcement that the tracking and interdiction of ships traveling to and from Iranian ports would be expanded to all command AORs. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据美国战争部发布的消息，美军在美军印太司令部（AOR）责任区内，对一艘载有伊朗石油的受制裁无国籍油轮“M/T Majestic X”号进行了海上拦截和登船检查。此举符合上周宣布的将对往返伊朗港口的船只进行追踪和拦截的范围扩大到所有司令部责任区的决定。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Open Source Intel Why President Trump’s Naval Blockade Is Doing What 40 Years of Sanctions Could Not Iran’s annual government budget sits around $56 billion. The U.S. federal budget exceeds $7 trillion, making the U.S. budget roughly 125 times larger (or about 12,400% bigger). If the U.S. naval blockade continues on Iran for 2-3 months, the loss for Iran would be the size of their annual budget. When does it get very serious? Weeks to months. 2 to 4 weeks: Full oil export halt, faster rial collapse, worsening food shortages, growing government salary delays. 1 to 2 months: Reserves heavily depleted, hyperinflation surges, wider industrial shutdowns, protests more likely. 2.5 to 3+ months: Losses near the full $56 billion annual budget, risk of government breakdown and widespread unrest. Important caveats: • Iran has buffers such as reserves, land routes, China trade, and shadow fleet tactics that may extend resilience. • Losses are not linear. Military and security forces would likely be prioritized for payment first. • Hyperinflation and protests would likely emerge before full fiscal collapse. • The real impact depends heavily on how strictly the blockade is enforced. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Open Source Intel 为什么特朗普总统的海军封锁能做到40年的制裁都做不到的事？伊朗的年度政府预算约为560亿美元。美国联邦预算超过7万亿美元，这意味着美国预算规模约为伊朗的125倍（或大出约12,400%）。如果美国对伊朗的海军封锁持续2-3个月，伊朗的损失将相当于其年度预算总额。什么时候情况会变得非常严重？几周到几个月。2到4周：石油出口全面停止，里亚尔汇率加速崩溃，粮食短缺加剧，政府工资发放延迟日益严重。1到2个月：储备金严重耗尽，恶性通货膨胀飙升，工业大范围停工，抗议活动更有可能发生。2.5到3个月以上：损失接近560亿美元的年度预算总额，政府面临崩溃和大规模动荡的风险。重要注意事项：• 伊朗拥有储备金、陆路贸易路线、中国贸易和影子船队策略等缓冲手段，可能会延长其韧性。• 损失并非线性。军事和安全部队的工资可能会被优先支付。• 恶性通货膨胀和抗议活动很可能会在财政彻底崩溃之前出现。• 实际影响在很大程度上取决于封锁执行的严格程度。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Department of War: Overnight, U.S. forces carried out a maritime interdiction and right-of-visit boarding of the sanctioned stateless vessel M/T Majestic X transporting oil from Iran, in the Indian Ocean within the INDOPACOM area of responsibility. We will continue global maritime enforcement to disrupt illicit networks and interdict vessels providing material support to Iran, wherever they operate. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部：昨晚，美军在印太司令部责任区内的印度洋上，对一艘载有伊朗石油的受制裁无国籍油轮“M/T Majestic X”号进行了海上拦截和登船检查。我们将继续在全球范围内进行海上执法，以破坏非法网络，并拦截任何为伊朗提供物质支持的船只，无论它们在哪里活动。推文

These jets belong to the 312th Fighter-Attack Squadron "Checkerboards" stationed at the Marine Corps Air Station Beaufort in South Carolina. tweet

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇸🇬 🇲🇾 🇮🇷 Indonesia’s finance minister has floated the idea of imposing a levy on ships passing through the Malacca Strait, inspired by Iran’s plan to charge tolls in the Strait of Hormuz. “Iran is now planning to charge ships … If we split it three ways – Indonesia, Malaysia, and Singapore – it could be quite substantial,” Purbaya Yudhi Sadewa said. Singapore’s foreign minister rejected the idea, stressing that transit passage is a right, not a privilege: “We will not participate in any attempts to close or interdict or to impose tolls in our neighbourhood.” Malaysia also reaffirmed its commitment to freedom of navigation under international law. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇩 🇸🇬 🇲🇾 🇮🇷 印度尼西亚财政部长提出了对通过马六甲海峡的船只征收税费的想法，灵感来自伊朗计划在霍尔木兹海峡收取通行费的计划。普尔巴亚·尤迪·萨德瓦（Purbaya Yudhi Sadewa）表示：“伊朗现在计划向船只收费……如果我们三方平分——印度尼西亚、马来西亚和新加坡——这可能是一笔相当可观的收入。”新加坡外交部长拒绝了这一想法，强调过境通行是一项权利，而非特权：“我们不会参与任何试图关闭、拦截或在我们邻近地区征收通行费的企图。”马来西亚也重申了其根据国际法维护航行自由的承诺。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Department of War announced that U.S. forces have carried out a maritime interdiction and right‑of‑visit boarding of the stateless vessel M/T Majestic X, which was transporting oil from Iran, in the Indian Ocean within the INDOPACOM area of responsibility. The Department of War said international waters cannot be used as a shield, and that it will continue global enforcement to disrupt illicit networks and deny sanctioned actors freedom of manoeuvre. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部宣布，美军在印太司令部责任区内的印度洋上，对一艘载有伊朗石油的无国籍油轮“M/T Majestic X”号进行了海上拦截和登船检查。战争部表示，国际水域不能被用作盾牌，并将继续在全球范围内进行执法，以破坏非法网络并剥夺受制裁行为体的机动自由。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇨🇳 Sky News: The personal details of 500,000 people held in the UK health database Biobank have reportedly been hacked and put up for sale online. The database includes genetic, medical and lifestyle information from volunteers used for scientific research, raising concerns over the exposure of highly sensitive data. Reports indicate the stolen data has appeared for sale on a Chinese platform, with officials warning about potential identification risks despite previous claims the data was anonymised. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇨🇳 天空新闻：据报道，英国生物银行（Biobank）健康数据库中持有的50万人的个人详细信息遭到黑客攻击，并在网上出售。该数据库包括用于科学研究的志愿者的基因、医疗和生活方式信息，引发了对高度敏感数据泄露的担忧。报告显示，被盗数据已出现在一个中国平台上进行销售，官员们警告称，尽管此前声称数据已匿名化，但仍存在潜在的身份识别风险。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺 🇮🇱 The Israeli Occupation Forces claimed they "replaced" the statue of Jesus Christ destroyed by one of their soldiers. They didn't. They took a cross from a local church and leaned it against a tree next to the original. Via: @irishmaninrussia 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 🇮🇪 Chay Bowes, The Irishman in Russia 🇷🇺 🇮🇱 以色列占领军声称他们“更换”了被其士兵摧毁的耶稣基督雕像。他们并没有。他们从当地教堂拿了一个十字架，靠在原雕像旁边的一棵树上。来源：@irishmaninrussia 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Ynet : Israel’s Supreme Court held a dramatic hearing today on petitions to force the government to establish a state commission of inquiry into the October 7 failures. Israeli Supreme Court Justice Yael Wilner told the government’s representative, Michael Ravallo: “You said ‘we’ll wait until we win and then investigate’ – that is dropping a bomb.” Israeli Deputy Chief Supreme Court Justice Noam Sohlberg suggested leaving the matter to the public after elections, while Justice Ofer Grosskopf noted the court has never forced the use of a state commission. The hearing was interrupted when MK Tali Gottlieb and other protesters tried to force their way into the courtroom. Outside, bereaved families clashed – some demanded a commission, others opposed it. Ravallo argued that the court has no authority to compel such an inquiry and that the government has the sole discretion. Ravallo is Prime Minister Netanyahu’s personal lawyer, and he is also Netanyahu’s candidate for state comptroller. As the hearing took place, coalition sources revealed that ten coalition members – including Minister Amichai Eliyahu and MK Eli Dallal – have signed a document supporting retired Supreme Court Justice Yosef Elron for the position. The election is by secret ballot in the Knesset; the opposition may also back Elron. The deadline is 3 June. Netanyahu may decide not to field a candidate if Elron has significant support. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Ynet：以色列最高法院今天就强制政府成立国家调查委员会调查10月7日失职事件的请愿书举行了戏剧性的听证会。以色列最高法院法官雅艾尔·威尔纳（Yael Wilner）告诉政府代表迈克尔·拉瓦洛（Michael Ravallo）：“你说‘我们等到赢了再调查’——这简直是投下了一枚炸弹。”以色列最高法院副院长诺姆·索尔伯格（Noam Sohlberg）建议在大选后将此事留给公众决定，而法官奥弗·格罗斯科普夫（Ofer Grosskopf）指出，法院从未强制要求使用国家调查委员会。听证会在议员塔利·戈特利布（Tali Gottlieb）和其他抗议者试图强行闯入法庭时中断。在法庭外，遇难者家属发生了冲突——一些人要求成立委员会，另一些人则表示反对。拉瓦洛辩称，法院无权强制进行此类调查，政府拥有唯一的裁量权。拉瓦洛是总理内塔尼亚胡的私人律师，也是内塔尼亚胡提名的国家审计长候选人。听证会进行时，执政联盟消息人士透露，十名联盟成员——包括部长阿米海·埃利亚胡（Amichai Eliyahu）和议员伊莱·达拉尔（Eli Dallal）——已经签署了一份支持退休最高法院法官约瑟夫·埃隆（Yosef Elron）担任该职位的支持文件。选举将在议会进行无记名投票；反对派也可能支持埃隆。截止日期为6月3日。如果埃隆获得大量支持，内塔尼亚胡可能会决定不派出候选人。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel HASAN PIKER, LEFT WING STAR WITH 11.3 MILLION FOLLOWERS SAYS HE SUPPORTS STEALING FROM GROCERY STORES: Reporter: “Would you steal from Whole Foods?” Hasan Piker: “I’m pro stealing from big corporations because they steal far more from their own workers. One thing that might help your ethical dilemma: these companies know the automated systems they design will increase shrink. It’s already factored in. They still end up with higher profit margins because they no longer have to pay cashiers, as opposed to using staffed checkout systems.” Reporter: “What about the argument that if everyone starts stealing, Whole Foods Market will eventually raise prices?” Hasan Piker: “Full chaos, let’s go. I’m also in favor of fast, free buses and government owned storefronts.” Reporter: “Would you encourage stealing in the same way from a Mamdani run city owned grocery store?” Hasan Piker: “No. That’s taxpayer funded and union labor…” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 拥有1130万粉丝的左翼明星HASAN PIKER表示他支持从杂货店偷窃：记者：“你会从全食超市（Whole Foods）偷东西吗？” Hasan Piker：“我支持从大公司偷窃，因为他们从自己的员工那里偷走的更多。有一件事可能有助于解决你的道德困境：这些公司知道他们设计的自动化系统会增加损耗。这已经被考虑在内了。他们最终仍然能获得更高的利润率，因为他们不再需要支付收银员工资，而不是使用人工结账系统。” 记者：“如果每个人都开始偷窃，全食超市最终会涨价，这个论点怎么看？” Hasan Piker：“彻底混乱吧，来吧。我还支持快速、免费的公交车和政府拥有的店面。” 记者：“你会鼓励以同样的方式从Mamdani管理的城市拥有的杂货店偷窃吗？” Hasan Piker：“不会。那是纳税人资助的，而且是工会劳工……” 推文

text: OSINTdefender A train of 9 U.S. Air Force KC-46A "Pegasus" aerial refueling aircraft are westbound over the Strait of Gibraltar, providing fuel for the transit to the Middle East for several U.S. Marine Corps F/A-18s of Marine Fighter Attack Squadron (VMFA) 312, the "Checkerboards," out of Marine Corps Air Station Beaufort, SC. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 一列9架美国空军KC-46A“飞马”空中加油机正在直布罗陀海峡上空向西飞行，为几架美国海军陆战队F/A-18战斗机（来自南卡罗来纳州博福特海军陆战队航空站的第312海军战斗攻击中队“棋盘”中队）前往中东提供燃料。 推文

text: Nuno Felix This is complete BS. FRANCE WARNS ISRAEL: SANCTIONS COMING WITHIN DAYS 🔴 French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot: “If the Israeli government does not change its policies in Gaza, the West Bank, and Lebanon, we cannot act as if nothing has happened.” Sanctions against Israel are currently being blocked due to Hungary's veto. However, I believe this veto will be lifted (with new Hungary PM) and that these sanctions will be implemented in the coming days.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 这完全是胡扯。法国警告以色列：制裁即将在几天内到来 🔴 法国外交部长让-诺埃尔·巴罗：“如果以色列政府不改变其在加沙、西岸和黎巴嫩的政策，我们就不能表现得好像什么都没发生过一样。” 目前针对以色列的制裁因匈牙利的否决而被阻止。然而，我相信这种否决将会被解除（随着匈牙利新总理上任），并且这些制裁将在未来几天内实施。” - 开源情报 推文

A woman had just approached him saying "we love you, please continue" before the man threw the paint. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047268131299533240/video/1 tweet

text: WarTranslated Russian forces have once again sent foreign mercenaries on a suicide assault - this time, a group of Kenyan citizens. One of them was identified by the "I Want to Live" project. Despite agreements reached between the Kremlin and certain African countries to stop recruiting their citizens, recruitment continues. The personal data of 2,965 citizens of African countries who have signed contracts with the Russian Armed Forces has been established. The top ten countries from which the largest number of mercenaries originate include: Kenya, Egypt, Cameroon, Ghana, Nigeria, Uganda, Algeria, Mali, South Sudan, and the Republic of South Africa. As of August 2025, the deaths of at least 316 African mercenaries have been confirmed. The actual losses are likely significantly higher. /1606301574/8255 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯军队再次派遣外国雇佣兵进行自杀式袭击——这次是一群肯尼亚公民。其中一人被“我想活下去”（I Want to Live）项目识别。尽管克里姆林宫与某些非洲国家达成了停止招募其公民的协议，但招募仍在继续。已确定了2965名与俄罗斯武装部队签署合同的非洲国家公民的个人数据。雇佣兵人数最多的前十个国家包括：肯尼亚、埃及、喀麦隆、加纳、尼日利亚、乌干达、阿尔及利亚、马里、南苏丹和南非共和国。截至2025年8月，已确认至少316名非洲雇佣兵死亡。实际损失可能要高得多。 /1606301574/8255 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reza Pahlavi to Western media: "I read in your newspapers about the tragedies of war. But what of the regime's crimes against my compatriots?" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047267006957732334/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Reza Pahlavi对西方媒体说：“我在你们的报纸上读到了战争的悲剧。但政权对我同胞的罪行又如何呢？” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047267006957732334/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Non stop Hezbollah attacks on the IDF, with no response. I imagine Israel is waiting for the talks to end. This likely will not last long before Israel begins a wide scale attack. The U.S. Embassy is urging all U.S. citizens to leave Lebanon. Telling sign. IDF: Hezbollah blatantly violated the ceasefire today by firing an anti-tank missile at our forces in Lebanon; there are no casualties. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 真主党不断攻击以色列国防军，但没有得到回应。我想以色列是在等待谈判结束。在以色列开始大规模攻击之前，这可能不会持续太久。美国大使馆敦促所有美国公民离开黎巴嫩。这是一个明显的迹象。以色列国防军：真主党今天公然违反停火协议，向我们在黎巴嫩的部队发射了反坦克导弹；没有人员伤亡。 - 开源情报 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 An Israeli airstrike targeted a vehicle car on Salah al‑Din street in central Gaza killed at least three people, including civil defence members Hazem Rami al‑Aidi, according to Palestinian reports. The Gaza health ministry reports that over the past day, six people were killed and eighteen wounded in the Strip, bringing the total Palestinian death toll since 7 October to 72,568. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 据巴勒斯坦报道，以色列的一次空袭瞄准了加沙中部萨拉赫丁街的一辆汽车，造成至少三人死亡，其中包括民防成员哈泽姆·拉米·艾迪。加沙卫生部报告称，过去一天，加沙地带共有六人死亡，十八人受伤，自10月7日以来，巴勒斯坦死亡总人数达到72,568人。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Reza Pahlavi on Western media: "It appears to me more often than not that there's a disconnect between the world media, Western media, from the reality on the ground in Iran. That is stupefying for me. I saw that to some extent in Stockholm and I see another occasion, it looks like you guys are on another planet. You're not hearing what the people on the streets are saying." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 Reza Pahlavi在西方媒体上说：“在我看来，世界媒体、西方媒体与伊朗实地现实之间往往存在脱节。这让我感到震惊。我在斯德哥尔摩在一定程度上看到了这一点，现在我又看到了另一个例子，看起来你们这些人好像在另一个星球上。你们没有听到街上的人在说什么。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @FrenchResponse : Attacking the three countries that have been the most committed to containing Iran’s nuclear ambitions… You’ll need more than AI-generated content to make that story sound credible. BREAKING: France, Germany, and Britain have shared intelligence with Iran on the movements of U.S. troops in the Middle East in exchange for no-charge passage through the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/ROYALMRBADNEWS/status/2047012776271290551/video/1 - THE REAL DARK JUDGE tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix RT @FrenchResponse : 攻击这三个最致力于遏制伊朗核野心的国家……你需要的不只是人工智能生成的内容来让那个故事听起来可信。突发：法国、德国和英国与伊朗分享了美国军队在中东行动的情报，以换取通过霍尔木兹海峡的免费通行权。 https://twitter.com/ROYALMRBADNEWS/status/2047012776271290551/video/1 - 真正的黑暗法官 推文

text: Open Source Intel Interesting, France has had 232 years to build a $47,000 per capita economy. Israel built a $62,000 one in 78 years. France GDP: $47,000 Israel GDP: $62,000 France Modern state established: 1792 Israel Modern state established: 1948 @Osint613 Don't forget, you're a small, weak country; Europe can easily crush you by canceling the economic cooperation agreement, never forget that! Besides, it's in Europe's interest: the rest of the world will be happy about it ;) - Olive tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 有趣的是，法国用了232年才建立起人均47,000美元的经济。以色列在78年内建立了一个62,000美元的经济。法国GDP：47,000美元 以色列GDP：62,000美元 法国现代国家建立：1792年 以色列现代国家建立：1948年 @Osint613 别忘了，你是一个弱小的国家；欧洲可以轻易通过取消经济合作协议来摧毁你，永远别忘了这一点！此外，这符合欧洲的利益：世界其他地方会为此感到高兴的 ;) - Olive 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Sharq Al-Awsat: Lebanon’s ambassador to the U.S. Nada Hamadeh Moawad will bring two conditions to the second round of talks with Israel: extend the ceasefire by 20‑40 days and stop the destruction of villages in southern Lebanon. If Israel agrees, the talks will move to setting a place and time for direct negotiations. Lebanon’s delegation will be headed by Simon Karam. On the law prohibiting contact with Israel, Lebanese sources said it is an internal parliamentary matter and cannot be demanded of Lebanon. No official White House invitation has been extended to Lebanese President Aoun. In last week’s call with Trump, Aoun said he does not want to speak with Netanyahu at this time, awaiting results on Israeli withdrawal, a ceasefire, prisoner release and the return of displaced residents. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Sharq Al-Awsat：黎巴嫩驻美大使Nada Hamadeh Moawad将向与以色列的第二轮谈判提出两个条件：将停火延长20-40天，并停止摧毁黎巴嫩南部的村庄。如果以色列同意，谈判将转向确定直接谈判的地点和时间。黎巴嫩代表团将由Simon Karam率领。关于禁止与以色列接触的法律，黎巴嫩消息人士称这是内部议会事务，不能要求黎巴嫩改变。白宫尚未向黎巴嫩总统奥恩发出正式邀请。在上周与特朗普的通话中，奥恩表示他目前不想与内塔尼亚胡交谈，正在等待以色列撤军、停火、释放囚犯和流离失所居民返回的结果。 @wfwitness

text: ☢️ 🇫🇷 🇵🇱 France and Poland plan to conduct air force exercises over the Baltic Sea involving Rafale fighter jets "with nuclear warheads", they will practice strikes on targets in Russia , reported the Wirtualna Polska portal, citing sources. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ☢️ 🇫🇷 🇵🇱 据Wirtualna Polska门户网站援引消息来源报道，法国和波兰计划在波罗的海上空进行涉及“携带核弹头”的阵风战斗机的空军演习，他们将演练对俄罗斯境内的目标进行打击。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 📝 Мир уже близко? 📝 тогда откуда столько кораблей Кстати, о кораблях, которые мы упомянули в прошлом посте. Одна из причин возможной задержки ударов, представленной Трампом как «стремление к миру», связано с задержкой авианосной ударной группы « Джорджа Буша ». 🖍 Изначально АУГ «Джорджа Буша» с четырьмя кораблями сопровождения должны были достичь северной части Индийского океана – южной Аравийского моря к 21 апреля, но в последние дни переход затянулся. По состоянию на вчера АУГ была в районе Мадагаскара , и с чем связана задержка до сих пор неясно. Либо техническая неполадка, либо изменение планов, но теперь прибытие кораблей планируется на 23-24 апреля. 🚩 Остальные боевые корабли остались примерно в тех же районах. При этом в восточной части Средиземного моря уже занимают заданные позиции эсминцы ВМС США. Отстал лишь эсминец «Гонсалес», который задержался у итальянских берегов. Что касается Красного моря , то «Джеральд Форд» с, предположительно, четырьмя кораблями сопровождения находятся наготове, в том числе и на случай включения хуситов в блокаду Баб эль-Мандебского пролива. ❗️ В общем и целом, боевой состав американского флота практически достиг своей полной готовности. И при отсутствии прогресса в переговорах нас наверняка будет ждать новый раунд конфликта. И особенно примечательно, что французский авианосец с кораблями сопровождения отодвинулся подальше от возможной зоны атак. Карта в высоком разрешении English version #Иран #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 和平已经临近了吗？ 📝 那为什么会有这么多船只？顺便说一下，我们在上一篇文章中提到的船只。特朗普所说的“追求和平”导致的打击延迟的原因之一，与“乔治·布什”号航母打击群的延迟有关。 🖍 最初，“乔治·布什”号航母打击群及其四艘护航舰艇应该在4月21日之前到达印度洋北部——阿拉伯海南部，但最近几天航行延误了。截至昨天，航母打击群在马达加斯加地区，延误的原因尚不清楚。要么是技术故障，要么是计划变更，但现在船只预计在4月23-24日到达。 🚩 其余战舰仍留在大致相同的区域。与此同时，美国海军的驱逐舰已经在东地中海占据了预定位置。只有“冈萨雷斯”号驱逐舰落后了，它在意大利海岸附近延误了。至于红海，“杰拉尔德·福特”号及其据推测的四艘护航舰艇已做好准备，包括以防胡塞武装封锁曼德海峡。 ❗️ 总而言之，美国海军的战斗编队几乎达到了完全准备状态。如果谈判没有进展，我们肯定会迎来新一轮冲突。特别值得注意的是，法国航空母舰及其护航舰艇已经撤离了可能的攻击区域。高分辨率地图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们
